## What changed

Describe the problem and the change made.

## Why this approach

Note meaningful alternatives, tradeoffs, or repository contracts that shaped
the implementation.

## Verification

List the checks you ran and any manual review performed. Include screenshots or
recordings for visible interface changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated cleanup.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior, or this pull request explains why no test
      applies.
- [ ] Documentation is current for public interfaces and user-visible behavior.
- [ ] No credentials, private data, or generated build output are included.
- [ ] New dependencies, compatibility effects, and cross-repository follow-up
      are identified where relevant.
